title: Customer Cohort
subtitle: List individual customers grouped by site, customer type and payment status.
noResults: No customers match the current filters.

col.name: Name
col.connectionFeeHint: Payments recorded as connection fee (explicit category only).
col.readyboardFeeHint: Payments recorded as readyboard fee (explicit category only).
col.feeRepaymentViaElectricityHint: Part of electricity-classified payments applied to connection+readyboard debt (50% cap; connection bucket first, then readyboard). Not split per transaction—see fee debt model.
col.electricityKwhHint: Currency applied to kWh purchase (electricity_portion). Does not include advance or financing repayments; those remain in Total paid only.
col.totalPaidHint: Sum of all payment rows. May exceed the four columns to the left because advance and financing repayments are not broken out here.
